title: Return values should not be ignored when they contain the operation status code
description: Ignoring return values that indicate the status of an operation can lead to undetected errors and unstable behavior. Always check and handle return values that provide operation status to ensure robust error handling and program correctness.
recommendation: Always check and handle return values that indicate the status of an operation. Implement appropriate error handling or logging when such values indicate a failure or unexpected result.
impact: Ignoring status return values may cause errors to go unnoticed, leading to incorrect program behavior or system instability.

checks.message: Always check and handle return values that indicate the status of an operation. Implement appropriate error handling or logging when such values indicate a failure or unexpected result.
